General.Name: Boill Healthcare Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Boill Healthcare Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, with its subsidiaries engaged in property development, healthcare holiday resort development, and foundation piling in Hong Kong and Mainland China. It operates through two main business lines: Property Development and Healthcare and Leisure. The Property Development segment involves the development, sales, and management of properties, including the Yangzhong Project and an integrated industrial zone in Fengxian District, Shanghai. This segment also includes the sale of surplus construction materials generated from property project operations. The Healthcare and Leisure business focuses on the distribution of herbal teas, grain-related drinks, huangjiu, other Chinese liquor products, and fast-moving consumer goods. It also trades and invests in securities. The company was formerly known as Ngai Shun Holdings Limited and changed its name to Boill Healthcare Holdings Limited in September 2017. Boill Healthcare Holdings Limited is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Toi Shan Association Building, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
